title: Add team-assign and work-item variants from Atom Drag Drop 2 figma spec
description: Team-assign: drag people from roster to team drop zones (avatar, name, role, skills). Work-item: drag sprint backlog items to team lanes (type, priority, points, tags, filter pills).
resolution: Added team-assign (roster → team drop zones with avatar, role, progress) and work-item (sprint backlog → team lanes with type/priority/points, filter pills, point totals) variants from Atom Drag Drop 2 figma. Added 13 structural roles, CSS for shared team/roster patterns, 2 sample configs. Added filter event to drag-drop contract. 17/17 proves pass.
